name: Stake DAO avUSD/frxUSD
redeem: This is a non-transferable Stake DAO lending wrapper for the Stake DAO avUSD/frxUSD vault. To exit, the borrower repays debt (if any) and withdraws; the wrapper burns and returns Stake DAO vault shares, which can then be redeemed for the underlying avUSD/frxUSD Curve LP position. Stake DAO says there is no lockup, but withdrawals are still subject to lending health checks and oracle availability.
notes: Market-specific Morpho collateral wrapper. Backed 1:1 by Stake DAO RewardVault shares; underlying vault asset is the avUSD/frxUSD Curve LP token. Non-transferable by design, so review liquidity at the vault/LP layer rather than the wrapper token itself.

sources.label: Stake DAO docs - How Lending Works
